basic_details.job_title: SAIL General Duty Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Steel Authority of India (SAIL) has officially announced the General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO) Recruitment 2026 with 3 openings. The detailed notification was published on the official SAIL website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 69 years and hold an MBBS Degree from a University/Institute recognized by MCI can participate in the walk-in recruitment process on 30 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply details are shared below.

content_sections.heading: SAIL General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the SAIL Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download SAIL General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: SAIL General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO) Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: MBBS from University/Institute recognized by MCI

content_sections.heading: SAIL General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for SAIL General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: SAIL General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for SAIL GDMO recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the SAIL General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO) recruitment is scheduled for 30th July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the GDMO post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO) post is an MBBS degree from a University or Institute recognized by the Medical Council of India (MCI).

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the GDMO position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO) post is 69 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the GDMO post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO) post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,00,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the GDMO post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO) position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the GDMO role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO) post will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by a Medical Screening.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in Dhanbad, Jharkhand, with the pincode 828135. The exact address will be detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO) position is offered on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs to the walk-in interview venue.
